generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how vital expanded domestic security powers are for protecting our communities. The current system is outdated and leaves gaps that bad actors exploit. We need modern tools to keep up with evolving threats. Trust me, this isn't about overreach—it's about keeping our families safe. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurRights
